payload.answer: Committed durable architecture decisions and preserved unresolved items as open questions.

payload.intent: compile durable memory from chat summary about Brain architecture

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while still saturating performance for Brain.

details: Compiled Brain DB as source of truth.
Compiled Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Compiled Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Recorded Telegram and model-cost/performance items as open questions only.
